report.summary: Fixed twitter.image metadata on 5 learn pages, added visual FAQ accordions to MiCA and DVT guide pages, created 3 new OG images for tool pages (airdrop-tracker, crypto-calendar, correlation-matrix), and audited carry-over UX items from prior cycles.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: mica-eu-crypto-regulation-guide-2026: Added visual FAQ accordion with 6 expandable Q&A items (previously only in structured data schema, not rendered on page)
distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide: Converted static FAQ boxes to interactive accordion with details/summary pattern for consistency across learn pages

Fixed twitter.image metadata on 5 learn pages: mica-eu-crypto-regulation-guide-2026, distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026, crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026, lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026

Carry-over audit: confirmed dca-calculator, bridge-aggregator still lack input validation error messages; market-recap, dex-screener, bridge-aggregator still lack shimmer/skeleton loading states; altcoin-etf-tracker, bridge-aggregator, tokenized-stocks-tracker lack dynamic freshness badges — flagged for next programmer cycle

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: airdrop-tracker (1200x630) — parachute/gift box icons with scattered token circles in brand gradient
OG image: crypto-calendar (1200x630) — calendar grid with highlighted event dates in multiple brand colors
OG image: correlation-matrix (1200x630) — 5x5 heatmap grid with green/red gradient correlation cells

sections.title: Remaining Work (Next Cycle)
items: ~67 tool pages still missing custom OG images (was 70, now 67 after this cycle)
Add input validation error messages to dca-calculator and bridge-aggregator components
Add shimmer/skeleton loading states to market-recap, dex-screener, bridge-aggregator
Add dynamic data freshness badges to altcoin-etf-tracker, bridge-aggregator, tokenized-stocks-tracker
Add keyboard accessibility handlers across interactive tool pages
